mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, userName, password, nickName, phone, church, birthday, description, level FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, userName, nickName, phone, church, birthday, description, level FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND LOWER(level) = 'superadmin'
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND LOWER(level) IN ('admin', 'superadmin')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_id, userName, password, nickName, phone, church, birthday, description, level ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{nickName}, #{phone}, #{church}, #{birthday}, #{description}, #{level, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET userName = #{userName}, password = #{password}, nickName = #{nickName}, phone = #{phone}, church = #{church}, birthday = #{birthday}, description = #{description}, level = #{level, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, userName, nickName, phone, church, birthday, description, level FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
